SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.annotation

注釈インタフェース NonNull

@Documented @Retention(CLASS) @Target({TYPE_USE,FIELD,METHOD,PARAMETER,CONSTRUCTOR,TYPE_PARAMETER,LOCAL_VARIABLE}) public @interface NonNull
Marks a type usage whose value must not be null. For documentation and static analysis; on public API methods in this library that validate arguments, passing null where NonNull is required causes NullPointerException (see each method's description).

This annotation does not add runtime null checks to your own API; use explicit validation or tooling (see the package description).

関連項目:
  • Nullable
  • NonNegative
  • Positive
